mentions_legales.label: Dénomination sociale (nom/raison sociale)
mentions_legales.quote: Waze Mobile Limited respects your privacy. Waze Mobile Limited and its affiliates (“Waze” or the “Company”)

mentions_legales.label: Forme juridique
mentions_legales.quote: a company incorporated and operating under the laws of Israel

mentions_legales.label: Adresse de l'établissement / siège social
mentions_legales.quote: located at 98 Yigal Alon st., Tel Aviv, Israel.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Présence d'une politique de confidentialité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: This Privacy Policy is meant to help you understand what information we collect, why we collect it, and how you can update, manage, and delete your information.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Identité du Responsable de Traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: The data controller responsible for your information is Waze Mobile Ltd., a company incorporated and operating under the laws of Israel, and located at 98 Yigal Alon st., Tel Aviv, Israel.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Coordonnées du DPO
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: you can contact Waze and our data protection office at: privacy@waze.com.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Types de données collectées + raison
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Account Information: information required when setting up an Account, such as your name or email address... Information that you choose to share with Waze: including a username you have chosen, reports associated with your username, phone number, “home” or “work” addresses, other “favorites”, car’s details, destinations you may travel to, search queries, calendar information... Detailed location, travel and route information... Meta-data (information about your device, browser and app use)...

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Base légale du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We process your information for the purposes described in this policy, based on the following legal grounds: *With your consent*... *When we’re pursuing legitimate interests*... *When we’re providing a service*... *When we’re complying with legal obligations*...

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Caractère obligatoire/facultatif + conséquences
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Waze will explicitly indicate the fields for mandatory completion. If you do not enter the requisite data in these fields, you may not be able to register your Account or to be provided with certain features

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Durée de conservation des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Some data you can delete whenever you like, some data is deleted automatically, and some data we retain for longer periods of time when necessary.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Destinataires des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Waze may share your de-identified information, including your Account settings, location and route-related data and meta-data with other Google mapping and navigation products and services... Personal information may also be shared with Waze’s trusted partners and service providers to process it for us, based on our instructions and in compliance with this policy and any other appropriate confidentiality and security measures.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Sécurité des données (art. 32 RGPD)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Waze implements systems, applications and procedures to secure your personal information, to minimize the risk of theft, damage, loss of information, or unauthorized access or use of information.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'introduire une plainte (CNIL)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: you can contact your local data protection authority if you have concerns regarding your rights under local law.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit de rectification
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You can always review and update certain information by visiting your Account & Login settings (such as your phone, name, photo and more)

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'accès
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You can log on to the Waze website to view your route history by going to “Edit the Map”/ “Drives” function on the Waze website.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à l'effacement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: If you would like us to delete your Account, please use the “Delete Account” function available under the in-app Privacy Setting and on the Waze website.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la limitation du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You also have the right to object to the processing of your information.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la portabilité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You can also export a copy of data in your Waze account if you want to back it up or export your information to another service.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'opposition
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You also have the right to object to the processing of your information.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Date de dernière mise à jour de la politique

cookies.label: Présence d'une politique cookies
cookies.quote: Waze may use cookies and similar technologies on the Services.

cookies.label: Retrait du consentement simple et à tout moment
Information sur le Responsable de Traitement
cookies.quote: The data controller responsible for your information is Waze Mobile Ltd., a company incorporated and operating under the laws of Israel, and located at 98 Yigal Alon st., Tel Aviv, Israel.

cookies.label: Finalité des cookies (claire et complète)
cookies.quote: Waze may use cookies for various purposes, such as to save you the need to re-enter your username and password each time you log in, to facilitate the use of the Website, to collect statistical information, to verify information, to detect and prevent abuse on the Services, to customize the Website to your personal preferences, and for information security purposes.

cookies.label: Durée de conservation des cookies
cookies.quote: Some of the cookies may expire when the session ends and you exit your browser. Other cookies are saved on your computer’s hard drive.

cookies.label: Détail des types de cookies déposés

transferts_hors_ue.label: Existence de transferts hors UE + destinataires
transferts_hors_ue.quote: to collect, store, hold and manage your personal information through cloud based or hosting services or a third-party or a party affiliated or connected to Waze, as reasonable for business purposes, which may be located in the European Union and the U.S.A., potentially countries outside of your jurisdiction

transferts_hors_ue.label: Stockage cloud hors UE + localisation serveurs
transferts_hors_ue.quote: to collect, store, hold and manage your personal information through cloud based or hosting services or a third-party or a party affiliated or connected to Waze, as reasonable for business purposes, which may be located in the European Union and the U.S.A., potentially countries outside of your jurisdiction

identite.quote: information required when setting up an Account, such as your name or email address
identite.purpose: Création et gestion du compte utilisateur, personnalisation des services

contact.quote: your name, email address and, in certain circumstances, your location and route information or other data which can be reasonably linked to such information by Waze
contact.purpose: Communication avec l'utilisateur, support, envoi d'informations liées aux services

compte_auth.quote: Your login details are your responsibility. You are fully accountable for any use or misuse of your Account and personal details as a result of conveying your login details to someone else. If you set a password, we recommend that you change your password frequently and at least once every six months.
compte_auth.purpose: Authentification et accès aux services Waze

localisation.quote: Location and route information is collected for example in the form of GPS and other sensor data from your device, combined with a time-stamp, IP address and other information from sensors and receivers on or around your device, on which the Application is installed and/or activated.
localisation.purpose: Fournir des services de navigation, alertes trafic, personnalisation des trajets

appareil_technique.quote: Waze collects information about the use of the Services and information from the device you have Waze installed on or the browser from which you use our Services. For example: [...] the Internet Protocol (IP) address and the name of the domain that serves you to access the Services, and the geographic location of the device that you are using to log in and use Waze on.
appareil_technique.purpose: Fonctionnement des services, personnalisation, sécurité et analyse technique

usage_comportement.quote: We collect information about your activity in the Services, which we use to provide you with the Services of Waze, including features which are meant to personalize your experience. This includes things like finding you the preferred route and proposing favorites or destinations commonly visited by you to streamline your search and travel.
usage_comportement.purpose: Personnalisation des services, amélioration de l'expérience utilisateur

contenus_utilisateur.quote: information that you choose to share with Waze, including a username you have chosen, reports associated with your username, phone number, “home” or “work” addresses, other “favorites”, car’s details, destinations you may travel to, search queries, calendar information [...] and files you have uploaded to the service, including voice and audio files, if applicable.
contenus_utilisateur.purpose: Partage d'informations avec la communauté, personnalisation des services

communications.quote: Communication you conduct through the Waze Services: if you choose to use Waze to communicate with other Waze users or third parties through the Waze Services, such as chat messages or sending pinned locations on the Waze platform.
communications.purpose: Faciliter les échanges entre utilisateurs via la plateforme Waze

donnees_tiers.quote: Waze may also collect information about apps installed on your device that Waze can link with - such as third-party music or media audio service apps (e.g. Spotify).
donnees_tiers.purpose: Intégration avec des services tiers pour enrichir l'expérience utilisateur

legal_bases.data: identite, contact, localisation, appareil_technique, usage_comportement, contenus_utilisateur, communications, donnees_tiers
legal_bases.quote: Subject to your prior indication of consent (to the extent required under applicable law), we may also use the email address that you provided to send you promotional and/or marketing materials.

legal_bases.data: identite, contact, compte_auth, localisation, appareil_technique, usage_comportement, contenus_utilisateur
legal_bases.quote: We process your data to provide a service you’ve asked for under a contract (including our terms of use).
We’ll process your data when we have a legal obligation to do so, for example, if we’re responding to legal process or an enforceable governmental request.

We process your information for our legitimate interests and those of third parties (such as partners including advertisers, in order to report use statistics) while applying appropriate safeguards that protect your privacy.

transfers.quote: To collect, store, hold and manage your personal information through cloud based or hosting services or a third-party or a party affiliated or connected to Waze, as reasonable for business purposes, which may be located in the European Union and the U.S.A., potentially countries outside of your jurisdiction
